remaining_tasks.name: Add RefererSourceStat nested class to AnalyticsDTO
Modify AnalyticsService to inject BlogDailySourceStatsMapper and add getRefererSources method

decisions.decision: @EnableScheduling annotation missing from OnePageApplication.java - must add for scheduled job to run
decisions.rationale: Phase 16 research identified @EnableScheduling is not present in the codebase

decisions.decision: AnalyticsDTO.RefererSourceStat nested class with source, displayName, pageViews, percentage fields
decisions.rationale: Pre-aggregated BlogDailySourceStats table queried for source breakdown - percentages calculated from totals

decisions.decision: AnalyticsAggregationJob runs daily at 00:05 via cron '0 5 0 * * ?'
decisions.rationale: Runs after midnight to aggregate previous day's page views; 5-minute buffer ensures all writes complete

decisions.decision: getRefererSources() uses BlogDailySourceStats pre-aggregated data (not raw page_views)
decisions.rationale: Phase 15-01-D03: pre-aggregation avoids per-page-view dashboard queries for performance

next_action: Execute Phase 16 with /gsd:execute-phase 16 - Task 1: Add @EnableScheduling to OnePageApplication.java
